---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new planning capability
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What planning or workflow problem would this solve?

## Suggested shape

Describe the feature as you imagine it.

## Financial impact

Does this affect calculations, projection timing, net worth, cash flow, taxes,
or audit output?

## Alternatives

What workaround do you use today?

## Notes

Please use synthetic data only. Do not include real account balances, family
details, database files, or backups.
